lede: A look at April 10 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Ismaël Gharbi and Faustina Agolley, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Invicta International Airlines Flight 435
events.desc: Invicta International Airlines Flight 435 crashes in a snowstorm on approach to Basel, Switzerland, killing 108 people.

events.title: Paul McCartney
events.desc: Paul McCartney announces that he is leaving The Beatles for personal and professional reasons.

events.title: Mexican Revolution
events.desc: Mexican Revolution leader Emiliano Zapata is ambushed and shot dead by government forces in Morelos.

events.title: American Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals
events.desc: The American Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (ASPCA) is founded in New York City by Henry Bergh.

events.title: Big Ben
events.desc: After the original Big Ben, a 14.5 tonnes (32,000 lb) bell for the Palace of Westminster, had cracked during testing, it is recast into the current 13.76 tonnes (30,300 lb) bell by Whitechapel Bell Foundry.

events.title: Mount Tambora
events.desc: The Mount Tambora volcano begins a three-month-long eruption, lasting until July 15. The eruption ultimately kills 71,000 people and affects Earth's climate for the next two years.

events.title: Napoleonic Wars
events.desc: Napoleonic Wars: The War of the Fifth Coalition begins when forces of the Austrian Empire invade Bavaria.

events.title: War of the Austrian Succession
events.desc: War of the Austrian Succession: Prussia gains control of Silesia at the Battle of Mollwitz.

events.title: Johann Sebastian Bach
events.desc: Bach leads the first performance of his cantata Erfreut euch, ihr Herzen, BWV 66, his first cantata composed for Easter in Leipzig.

events.title: Pope Leo IV
events.desc: Election of Pope Leo IV following the death of Pope Sergius II.

births.name: Stephanie Sheh
births.line: Taiwanese-American voice actress, director, and producer

births.name: Doris Leuthard
births.line: Swiss lawyer and politician, 162nd President of the Swiss Confederation

births.name: Narayan Rane
births.line: Indian politician, 16th Chief Minister of Maharashtra

deaths.text: Nino Rota, Italian pianist, composer, and conductor
Jan Marek Marci, Czech physician and author

observances.text: Christian feast day: James, Azadanus and Abdicius
Christian feast day: Pierre Teilhard de Chardin (Episcopal Church)
